description_long: This is a modern, sporty pair of sunglasses featuring a semi-rimless design with a robust, angular frame. The frame is metallic in appearance, with straight, slightly contoured temples that provide a secure fit around the ears. The lenses are large, dark-tinted, and wrap around the face, offering broad coverage and a sleek, aerodynamic look. The bridge is a simple, straight bar that connects the two lenses seamlessly, with no visible nose pads. The temples are relatively thick and uniform in width, with subtle geometric cutouts near the hinges for added style. No visible brand logo or decorative embellishments are present, giving the glasses a minimalist, functional aesthetic.
description: Sporty, semi-rimless sunglasses with dark wraparound lenses and a metallic, angular frame. The design is minimalist and functional, with thick temples and no visible branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the straight, thick temples and the semi-rimless frame structure.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, dark-tinted wraparound lenses and the straight bridge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the temple and frame details seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the curvature of the frame and the broad lens coverage.
attribute_frame_design: The frame has a semi-rimless, angular design with straight, thick temples and a straight, minimalistic bridge. The temples are uniform in width and feature subtle geometric cutouts near the hinges, contributing to a sporty and modern look.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are dark-tinted, nearly black, with a uniform coloration and a slight reflective quality. They provide full coverage and have a wraparound style.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a straight, solid bar connecting the lenses without visible nose pads or additional support structures. It is simple and unembellished.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are thick, straight, and feature subtle geometric cutouts near the hinges. There are no visible engravings, patterns, or decorative elements.
